question: Will the US and Iran jointly announce a nuclear framework agreement by June 30, 2026?
reason: US and Iran are nearing a framework agreement on Iran's nuclear program.
evidence: President Trump announced that a deal to end the war with Iran would be finalized 'shortly,' with final negotiations currently underway. ([axios.com](https://www.axios.com/2026/05/23/us-iran-trump-deal-war?utm_source=openai))

The United States and Iran are close to reaching a framework agreement on Tehran’s nuclear program, with negotiations now focused on final wording related to Iran’s nuclear stockpile and the Strait of Hormuz. ([caliber.az](https://caliber.az/en/post/fox-news-us-iran-95-close-to-framework-nuclear-agreement?utm_source=openai))

Iran has agreed in principle to dispose of highly-enriched uranium in negotiations with the U.S., although a deal likely won't be signed this weekend. ([cbsnews.com](https://www.cbsnews.com/amp/news/iran-peace-deal-negotiations-highly-enriched-uranium/?utm_source=openai))
